'''Bran Isken''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] who often worked as an [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
The son of a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and born on a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], he learned how to repair things at a young age. He met [[Klis Joo]] while working on a ship for some [[Duros/Legends|Duros]]. When Joo became the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of a [[City/Legends|city]], she invited him to come to [[Almas]] to work for her. One of the first things he did for her was upgrade [[Forard]]'s [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] from a four-ship center to a twenty-ship one.

Bran was often willing to do favors for people, but would call in favors in return. He had many contacts with smugglers and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], and still sometimes worked on smuggling vessels on the side while working at Forard. [[Nirama]] tried a couple of times to lure Isken to work for his [[organization]], but Isken enjoyed his work and knew it was safer working on Almas.

==Personality and traits==
Bran was considered a friendly man, but sometimes suspicious. He was tall and rakish looking, with [[Color/Legends|dark hair]] and a patchy beard. As he got on in [[Standard year/Legends|years]], he dyed his hair to look younger. He had an obvious [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] [[Eye/Legends|eye]] and usually dressed in overalls.

==Sources==
